name: Crab and Three Cheese Strata
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a 9-inch x 14-inch baking dish.
2. Layer the bread with ricotta, crab, Jack and cheddar cheese, and chiles.
3. In a large mixing bowl, blend eggs, milk, butter, and mustard until combined.
4. Pour the egg mixture over the bread layer, covering all of it.
5. Cover the strata with plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes or until the eggs are set.
This is from the Pacific Grove Inn (Bed & Breakfast accommodations), Pacific Grove, CA. Source: Monterey's Secrets Cookbook.
